subcodes.first_line: O Nasru'llah! Say: O ye that have turned aside! "He doeth whatsoever He willeth" hath ever been and shall forever remain true. No matter among all matters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نصرالله بگو ای معرضین بیان حق یفعل ما یشاء بوده و هست هیچ امری از امور و
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @chastisement and requital
